decision.summary: Keep the weekly 74k reach position and open the April 10 BTC 74k reach market.
decision.rationale: The live weekly `will-bitcoin-reach-74k-april-6-12` Yes position is only at 61.5%, so it does not qualify for take-profit and early-stage rules keep it open. The latest 2026-04-10 Beecthor transcript and summary keep the short-term thesis bullish into roughly 73.3k-74.1k before looking for shorts, with the broader bearish invalidation only above 76k, and Binance confirms that execution reality with BTC at 73087.29 and a 24h high of 73289.96. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest available daily upside target above spot is `will-bitcoin-reach-74k-on-april-10`; at 28.0% it is not priced aggressively and still aligns with the current thesis.
